mapper.sql: s.scene_id, s.scene_code, s.scene_name, s.execution_mode, s.primary_model_id, s.fallback_model_id, pm.model_name AS primary_model_name, fm.model_name AS fallback_model_name, s.candidate_limit, s.timeout_ms, s.enabled, s.remark, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clinic_ai_scene_binding s LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_model pm ON pm.model_id = s.primary_model_id LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_model fm ON fm.model_id = s.fallback_model_id WHERE s.scene_id = #{sceneId}

SELECT FROM clinic_ai_scene_binding s LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_model pm ON pm.model_id = s.primary_model_id LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_model fm ON fm.model_id = s.fallback_model_id WHERE s.scene_code = #{sceneCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM clinic_ai_scene_binding s LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_model pm ON pm.model_id = s.primary_model_id LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_model fm ON fm.model_id = s.fallback_model_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND s.scene_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sceneCode}, '%')
AND s.scene_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sceneName}, '%')
AND s.enabled = #{enabled}
ORDER BY s.scene_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_ai_scene_binding SET primary_model_id = #{primaryModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, fallback_model_id = #{fallbackModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}
